invalid_non_review_cli_outputs_not_count.reason: CLI output ended before a verdict or findings were returned and is not counted as a valid pack-level review.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-038 RP00.P02.M07.S10 idempotency key handling is correct and internally consistent. The prechecker consumes only the S09 state-transition result (validates S09 subphase marker, test_and_golden_case_set entrypoint, state_transition_receipt presence, non-blank audit_event_ref, and carried allow_metadata_only + applied), then emits a frozen metadata-only idempotency receipt with all 62 result fields and 20 receipt fields. Unsafe claims fail closed via 35 forbidden claims plus an unknown-claim catch-all rejecting any truthy value (only synthetic idempotency_key whitelisted, pattern-validated). All runtime/test/golden/audit/permission/storage/idempotency-store/lock permitted flags are false with matching doesNot* assertions across policy, prechecker, contract definition, and fixture. M07 stays open (completesSourceMicroPhase false, weighted boundary terminal false) and hands off to RP00.P02.M07.S11. Validator additions cross-check definition, policy/prechecker modules, fixture, live precheck-vs-fixture equality, explicit-key acceptance, and negative paths; tests mirror these. S09 added to requiredClosedSubphases and current subphase advanced to S10. No defects found.
